queries: Analyze the repository at repo_url. Use repomix-python to pack the repo with xml output style and output splitting enabled (split_output=500*1024). Read all split parts into memory as a list of chunks, then use llm_query_batched to analyze each chunk concurrently — each sub-LLM should identify the modules, public APIs, architecture patterns, and inter-module dependencies in its section. Aggregate the partial analyses with a final llm_query to produce a comprehensive architectural summary.
